summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ComuniPy (Next.js 14 mock SaaS). All 12 requested feature flows validated against http://localhost:3000. 27/27 test assertions passed after fixing a corrupted .next cache on the dev server. Landing, LoginScreen (4 profiles), AdminDashboard + EdificioView, ResidenteDashboard (reclamos/votaciones/pago modal), TrabajadorDashboard and SuperAdminDashboard (dark neon theme) all working. No console errors, no page errors.

issues: Dark logo (Logo Dark.png) blends into the dark background (bg-ink-900/85) and is barely visible in the top-left; consider a lighter/inverted variant or higher-contrast logo for the backoffice header.
Anim-fade-up elements briefly render invisible on first paint; not a bug but users on very slow machines may see empty hero for a few hundred ms.

action_items: None mandatory. Optional: swap SuperAdmin header logo for a brighter/light-mode-friendly variant so it isn't lost on the dark backdrop.
Optional: ensure /app/.next is cleared before shipping (a stale cache produced a 'Cannot find module ./421.js' server error during first navigation — fixed by rm -rf .next && yarn dev).
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.tsx is 1301 lines with 15 embedded view components — should be split into per-tab files (>700 line rule).
AdminDashboard root does NOT expose a data-testid such as 'admin-dashboard' (unlike residente/trabajador/superadmin) — add one for symmetry and easier E2E targeting.

HamburgerMenu drawer nav has overflow-y-auto but items are positioned inside a fixed drawer; Playwright classical .click() fails with 'element outside of viewport' unless JS click or scrollTo(0,0) is used before opening — acceptable but a data-testid on the nav list would allow scrolling into view.
page.tsx has no persistence: refreshing the browser drops the session (setState only). Acceptable for a mock but should be noted.
test_credentials: N/A — 4 demo profiles clickable on LoginScreen (u1 SuperAdmin, u2 Admin, u3 Residente, u6 Trabajador). No password required.
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_ reclamo ('TEST_Fuga en pasillo') and cast one vote via the UI. Data lives only in local component state and is reset on logout/refresh, so no cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is Next.js 14 running via `yarn dev` on http://localhost:3000. There is NO backend and NO REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — this is a purely frontend mock. If you see a Next.js server error 'Cannot find module ./XXX.js', it's a stale .next cache; kill the yarn dev process, `rm -rf /app/.next`, then `cd /app && nohup yarn dev > /tmp/next.log 2>&1 &` and wait ~10s. For HamburgerMenu items, always call `window.scrollTo(0,0)` before opening the drawer and prefer `page.evaluate("document.querySelector('[data-testid=...]').click()")` to bypass viewport-clipping errors on `fixed`-positioned drawer contents. Full list of confirmed working data-testids: landing-page, header-login-btn, hero-cta-demo, cta-demo-btn, nav-perfiles, nav-módulos, perfil-card-0..2, module-0..11, benefit-0..5, login-screen, login-profile-u1/u2/u3/u6, login-back-btn, app-header, hamburger-open, hamburger-close, hamburger-overlay, hamburger-drawer, logout-btn, menu-item-<id>, residente-dashboard, superadmin-dashboard, trabajador-dashboard, edificio-view, add-espacio-btn, save-espacio-btn, add-unidad-esp1, save-unidad-esp1, reclamo-titulo, reclamo-descripcion, reclamo-submit, vote-<votingId>-<optionId>, pay-method-spi/tigo/personal/transfer, pay-modal, pay-confirm-btn. NOTE: AdminDashboard root has NO data-testid.
rca of the issue: Initial page fetch returned HTTP 500 with body containing 'Server Error: Cannot find module ./421.js' referenced from /app/.next/server/webpack-runtime.js. Root cause: the /app/.next directory contained artifacts from a prior `next export`/build (BUILD_ID, export-marker.json, export-detail.json all present) that were incompatible with a fresh `next dev` webpack runtime. Reproduction: with the stale .next present, `curl http://localhost:3000/` returned the _error page. Mitigation applied: killed the running next process, `rm -rf /app/.next`, restarted with `cd /app && nohup yarn dev > /tmp/next.log 2>&1 &`; server recompiled cleanly in ~6s and every subsequent test passed. Recommend adding an .nvm/`predev` step or CI check that removes any exported .next before starting the dev server.
